title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Prompt Defense
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a durable task state and handoff record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Store durable task details in files or structured summaries before context compaction.
Distinguish messages that change the active run from follow-up work that should wait.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: State Summary · changed case
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Which action demonstrates State Summary without dropping earlier contracts?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.

content.text: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: prompt long context. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies State Summary, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a durable task state and handoff record.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Conversation length itself preserves every important decision. This fails the State Summary contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Anthropic Prompt Engineering Overview (Current 2026-07-13) — Controls success criteria, empirical evaluation, and the living Claude prompt-engineering workflow.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the State Summary evidence cycle before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps State Summary assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Handoff Quality applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Produce a handoff that another agent or human can continue without rediscovery.
